q: You will not be allowed to go into the library if you do not have your personal library card. (Use 'without + V-ing'.) 2025
a: Without having your personal library card, you will not be allowed to go into the library.

q: They climbed the mountain. No one guided them. (Join the sentences, using 'without+V-ing'.) 2025
a: They climbed the mountain without being guided (by anyone).

q: She cleans her room every day. Nobody urges her. (Join the sentences, beginning with 'Without + V-ing'.) 2025
a: Without being urged, she cleans her room every day.

q: They continued their journey. They did not take any rest. (Join the sentences, using 'without + V-ing'.) 2026
a: They continued their journey without taking any rest.

q: Thiha left the village. He didn't say goodbye to anyone. (Join the sentences, using 'without+ Ving'.) 2026
a: Thiha left the village without saying goodbye to anyone.
